hyperdisplay_include.tooltip: Include SparkFun HyperDisplay base library header (use with specific display driver library)

hyperdisplay_fill_window.tooltip: Fill current display window with default color (clear screen)

hyperdisplay_pixel.tooltip: Draw a single pixel at specified coordinates

hyperdisplay_line.message0: HyperDisplay %1 draw line from(%2, %3) to(%4, %5) width %6
hyperdisplay_line.tooltip: Draw a line segment between two points

hyperdisplay_rectangle.message0: HyperDisplay %1 draw rectangle from(%2, %3) to(%4, %5) filled %6
hyperdisplay_rectangle.tooltip: Draw a rectangle or filled rectangle in the specified area

hyperdisplay_circle.message0: HyperDisplay %1 draw circle center(%2, %3) radius %4 filled %5
hyperdisplay_circle.tooltip: Draw a circle at specified position

hyperdisplay_print.tooltip: Print text at specified coordinate position
